rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"The `totalCourses` field on the dashboard response distinguishes 'no courses assigned' (0) from 'viewing without courses' — always include a count field alongside array data for frontend conditional r","scope":"src/app/api/instructor/dashboard/route.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Admin oversight UI uses a distinct 'Course Oversight' heading (not the instructor's 'Your Courses' heading) to differentiate the admin supervisory view from the instructor self-view.","scope":"src/app/(frontend)/instructor-dashboard/InstructorDashboardContent.tsx"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The server-side pattern builds an `instructorsByCourse` map from `courses` + `course-instructors` collections, then injects the per-course instructor array into each course object before returning — a","scope":"src/app/api/instructor/dashboard/route.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The InstructorDashboardContent component conditionally renders the admin 'Course Oversigh
